stories.headline: Netflix's ridiculous I Will Find You is designed for second-screen viewing - AV Club
stories.summary: Sam Worthington, Britt Lower, and Milo Ventimiglia lead a contrived, almost offensive thriller.

stories.summary: Ms. Juicy was frightened after police told her she was going to be arrested and taken to jail ... and her emotional reaction is all on video.

stories.headline: Harry and Meghan to visit UK with family for the first time in 4 years, British media reports - CNN

stories.headline: Tyrese Haliburton’s bride-to-be shares heartbreaking tribute after her ‘once-in-a-lifetime friend’ dies on bachelorette trip - New York Post
